author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 7: Risk & Money Management**

In this module we will go over EVERYTHING Risk.

This is probably one of the most important modules you need to watch.

This covers everything from scaling, account size, A+ vs subpar trades & so much more.

**Workshop 7 Content:** 👇

Lesson 1 - **Sizing & Scaling Trades**

Lesson 2 - **Trade Management & Money Management**
